name: fetch-frequencies registry: resolution order is exactly override then registry-default then global-default
command:
printf 'default: weekly
registries:
  standards: 12h
sources:
  overridden: 5m
' > ff.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/fetch-frequency-registry.sh" --source-id overridden --registry standards --file "$PWD/ff.yaml"; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/fetch-frequency-registry.sh" --source-id only-registry --registry standards --file "$PWD/ff.yaml"; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/fetch-frequency-registry.sh" --source-id neither --registry compliance --file "$PWD/ff.yaml"
